tasks.label: PMPro recent orders
tasks.command: c:\xampp\php\php.exe c:\xampp\htdocs\seramor\wp-cli.phar db query "SELECT id, user_id, membership_id, status, gateway, total, datetime FROM wp_pmpro_membership_orders ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 8;" --path=c:\xampp\htdocs\seramor

tasks.label: PMPro memberships
tasks.command: c:\xampp\php\php.exe c:\xampp\htdocs\seramor\wp-cli.phar db query "SELECT um.user_id, um.membership_id, l.name, um.status, um.startdate, um.enddate FROM wp_pmpro_memberships_users um LEFT JOIN wp_pmpro_membership_levels l ON l.id = um.membership_id ORDER BY um.id DESC LIMIT 8;" --path=c:\xampp\htdocs\seramor

tasks.label: PMPro recent orders args
args: SELECT id, user_id, membership_id, status, gateway, total, datetime FROM wp_pmpro_membership_orders ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 8;

tasks.label: PMPro memberships args
args: SELECT um.user_id, um.membership_id, l.name, um.status, um.startdate, um.enddate FROM wp_pmpro_memberships_users um LEFT JOIN wp_pmpro_membership_levels l ON l.id = um.membership_id ORDER BY um.id DESC LIMIT 8;

tasks.label: MySQL recent PMPro orders
args: SELECT id, user_id, membership_id, status, gateway, total, datetime FROM wp_pmpro_membership_orders ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 8;

tasks.label: MySQL PMPro memberships
args: SELECT um.user_id, um.membership_id, l.name, um.status, um.startdate, um.enddate FROM wp_pmpro_memberships_users um LEFT JOIN wp_pmpro_membership_levels l ON l.id = um.membership_id ORDER BY um.id DESC LIMIT 8;

tasks.label: Count PMPro memberships
args: SELECT COUNT(*) AS memberships_count FROM wp_pmpro_memberships_users;

tasks.label: Recent PMPro orders fixed
args: SELECT id, user_id, membership_id, status, gateway, total, timestamp FROM wp_pmpro_membership_orders ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 8;

tasks.label: Recent PMPro orders after auth
args: SELECT id, user_id, membership_id, status, gateway, total, timestamp FROM wp_pmpro_membership_orders ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;

tasks.label: Recent PMPro orders now
args: SELECT id, code, user_id, membership_id, status, gateway, gateway_environment, total, payment_transaction_id, subscription_transaction_id, timestamp FROM wp_pmpro_membership_orders ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 8;

tasks.label: PMPro memberships now
args: SELECT um.id, um.user_id, um.membership_id, l.name, um.status, um.startdate, um.enddate FROM wp_pmpro_memberships_users um LEFT JOIN wp_pmpro_membership_levels l ON l.id = um.membership_id ORDER BY um.id DESC LIMIT 8;

tasks.label: Check PMPro Stripe runtime
args: echo 'env=' . get_option('pmpro_gateway_environment') . PHP_EOL; echo 'gateway=' . get_option('pmpro_gateway') . PHP_EOL; echo 'secret=' . ( get_option('pmpro_stripe_secretkey') ? strlen(get_option('pmpro_stripe_secretkey')) : 0 ) . PHP_EOL; echo 'pub=' . ( get_option('pmpro_stripe_publishablekey') ? strlen(get_option('pmpro_stripe_publishablekey')) : 0 ) . PHP_EOL; echo 'using_api_keys=' . ( PMProGateway_stripe::using_api_keys() ? 'yes' : 'no' ) . PHP_EOL;

tasks.label: Count memberships after replay
args: SELECT COUNT(*) AS memberships_count FROM wp_pmpro_memberships_users; SELECT id, user_id, membership_id, status, payment_transaction_id, subscription_transaction_id FROM wp_pmpro_membership_orders ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 4;

tasks.label: Check Sobre Ser Amor page row
args: SELECT ID, post_title, post_name, post_status, post_type, post_parent, post_modified, CHAR_LENGTH(post_content) AS content_len FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type='page' AND (post_title LIKE '%Sobre%' OR post_title LIKE '%Ser Amor%' OR post_name LIKE '%sobre%' OR post_name LIKE '%ser-amor%') ORDER BY ID DESC;

tasks.label: List recent WP pages
args: SELECT ID, post_title, post_name, post_status, guid FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type='page' ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 50;

tasks.label: MySQL find sobre pages
args: & 'c:\xampp\mysql\bin\mysql.exe' -u root -D seramor -e "SELECT ID, post_title, post_name, post_status, post_type, post_parent, post_modified, CHAR_LENGTH(post_content) AS content_len FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type='page' AND (post_title LIKE '%Sobre%' OR post_title LIKE '%Ser Amor%' OR post_name LIKE '%sobre%' OR post_name LIKE '%seramor%') ORDER BY ID DESC;"

tasks.label: Search sobre-seramor references
args: Get-ChildItem -Path 'c:\xampp\htdocs\seramor\wp-content' -Recurse -File | Select-String -Pattern 'sobre-seramor|sobre-ser-amor|Sobre Seramor|Sobre Ser Amor' | Select-Object Path, LineNumber, Line -First 80 | Format-Table -Wrap

tasks.label: WP get Sobre Seramor meta
args: $page = get_page_by_path('sobre-seramor'); if (!$page) { echo "NOT_FOUND\n"; return; } echo 'ID=' . $page->ID . PHP_EOL; echo 'TITLE=' . $page->post_title . PHP_EOL; echo 'STATUS=' . $page->post_status . PHP_EOL; echo 'CONTENT_LEN=' . strlen((string) $page->post_content) . PHP_EOL;

tasks.label: WP list Sobre Seramor revisions
args: $page = get_page_by_path('sobre-seramor'); if (!$page) { echo "NOT_FOUND\n"; return; } $revisions = wp_get_post_revisions($page->ID, array('order' => 'DESC')); foreach ($revisions as $revision) { echo 'REV=' . $revision->ID . ' DATE=' . $revision->post_modified . ' LEN=' . strlen((string) $revision->post_content) . PHP_EOL; }
